design_philosophy.core_loop: Top-down run-and-gun action with stage objectives: navigate levels, eliminate terrorists, avoid civilian casualties, collect weapons, reach stage goal
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balancing aggressive combat with civilian protection constraint (failure to protect 3+ civilians forces stage restart)
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Play as Harry Tasker executing covert espionage missions with escalating weaponry and tactical objectives
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Civilian casualty mechanic creates moral/tactical tension unusual for run-and-gun genre; film license drives narrative framing but gameplay remains pure action-focused rather than story-driven

difficulty.lives_system: Limited lives with power-ups available to restore health
difficulty.continues_system: Password feature allows restart at later stages, providing continues mechanism
difficulty.checkpointing: Stage-based checkpointing via password system; restart at stage cost if 3+ civilians killed
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Civilian protection rule creates dynamic difficulty - same stage can be restarted by player error, adding skill-based challenge layer

progression.upgrade_system: Weapon progression: starts with unlimited semi-automatic pistol (15-round reload), unlocks Uzi, shotgun, flamethrower, grenades, and anti-personnel mines throughout each stage; limited ammo on non-pistol weapons requiring resource scavenging
progression.unlock_mechanism: Nine linear stages unlock sequentially: chateau → mall → park → subway → dock → Chinese city → oil refinery → overseas highway → office building. Password system allows non-sequential access.
replayability_hooks: Secret areas present in stages (mentioned as providing gameplay relief from repetition)
Multiple weapon configurations per stage encourage different tactical approaches
Civilian protection constraint creates variable challenge conditions on replay
Hidden level select password (MNCHT) enables speedrun/challenge modes

world_building_techniques: Film stills mark level beginnings and game conclusion, providing cinematic framing
Stage locations tied to film narrative (chateau, mall, park, subway, dock, Chinese city, oil refinery, overseas highway, office building)
Stage objectives framed around foiling terrorist plot of Salim Abu Aziz

danger_signals: Terrorist plot requiring covert espionage intervention
International locations (Switzerland, China, Florida) suggesting global threat
Civilian presence in combat zones indicating urban terrorism scenario

sources_used: Wikipedia - True Lies (video game): Gameplay section, Reception section
The Cutting Room Floor - True Lies (SNES): Level select information
